name: demo2codex
description: Map demo-review feedback to relevant repository modules so the user's Codex model can produce precise Chinese TODOs.

interface.shortDescription: Turn demo feedback into focused Chinese TODOs.
interface.longDescription: Record a local demo review, connect each focused discussion to the most likely page and repository module, then let the user's active Codex model inspect the code and produce short Chinese TODOs. Code details stay out of the TODO text; an approximate module is available only from a hover icon.
defaultPrompt: Start a demo review for this repository.
Finish the review and turn only the discussed changes into concise Chinese TODOs.
